sections.paragraph:
κτήτωρ, ορος, ὁ (Diod S 34 + 35, 2, 31; POxy 237 VIII, 31; 718, 13; PTebt 378, 24; et al. [New Docs 2, 89] Jo 1:11 Sym.) owner of houses and lands χωρίων ἢ οἰκιῶν Ac 4:34 (cp. 1QS 1:11f).—DELG s.v. κτάομαι 7. M-M.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

1QS 1QS = The Manual of Discipline—List 2, end

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 572
